raw.message: A Passion for Running: Join the 456 Run Challenge

hook.summary: A Roblox-style character in a Squid Game tracksuit lies nervously in a bunk bed.
hook.visual_action: The camera pans across a dark, crowded dormitory filled with bunk beds while the character looks around anxiously.
hook.text_overlay: POV: try to sleep in squid game

scene_flow: A Roblox character in a green tracksuit lies in a bunk bed looking anxious.
The camera pans through the dark dormitory showing rows of bunk beds and other players.
A player from an upper bunk jumps down suddenly, startling the main character.
The scene cuts to gameplay of a character jumping across floating ice platforms in a winter-themed challenge.
A hand appears on screen to tap the 'Play Now' button over the gameplay footage.
on_screen_text: POV: try to sleep in squid game
audience_proxy: Casual gamers and fans of the Squid Game aesthetic who enjoy simple, high-stakes runner games.
